request.prompt: Register the supplier Silveroak Ltd with organization number 811867500. Email: faktura@silveroakltd.no.

content.text:
Today's date: 2026-03-19

Register the supplier Silveroak Ltd with organization number 811867500. Email: faktura@silveroakltd.no.
I'll register Silveroak Ltd as a supplier in the system. Let me first check the customer endpoint documentation to understand the exact parameters needed.

content.content:
{"method":"POST","path":"/customer","category":"customer","summary":"Create customer. Related customer addresses may also be created.","documentation":"#### `POST /customer`

**Summary:** Create customer. Related customer addresses may also be created.

**Request Body:** `application/json; charset=utf-8` → `Customer`

**Responses:**

- `201`: successfully created → `ResponseWrapperCustomer`
"}

content.text: Now let me check the Customer schema to see the exact field names:

content.content:
{"name":"Customer","documentation":"### `Customer` | Property | Type | Required | Description | |----------|------|----------|-------------| | `accountManager` | Employee | | | | `bankAccountPresentation` | Array | | | | `bankAccounts` | Array | | | | `category1` | CustomerCategory | | | | `category2` | CustomerCategory | | | | `category3` | CustomerCategory | | | | `changes` | Array | | (read-only) | | `currency` | Currency | | | | `customerNumber` | integer | | | | `deliveryAddress` | DeliveryAddress | | | | `department` | Department | | | | `description` | string | | | | `discountPercentage` | number | | Default discount percentage for this customer. | | `displayName` | string | | | | `email` | string | | | | `emailAttachmentType` | string enum: ['LINK', 'ATTACHMENT'] | | Define the invoice attachment type for emailing to the customer.
LINK: Send invoice as link in em | | `globalLocationNumber` | integer | | | | `id` | integer | | | | `invoiceEmail` | string | | | | `invoiceSMSNotificationNumber` | string | | Send SMS-notification to this number. Must be a norwegian phone number | | `invoiceSendMethod` | string enum: ['EMAIL', 'EHF', 'EFAKTURA', 'AVTALEGIRO', 'VIPPS', 'PAPER', 'MANUAL'] | | Define the invoicing method for the customer.
EMAIL: Send invoices as email.
EHF: Send invoice | | `invoiceSendSMSNotification` | boolean | | Is sms-notification on/off | | `invoicesDueIn` | integer | | Number of days/months in which invoices created from this customer is due | | `invoicesDueInType` | string enum: ['DAYS', 'MONTHS', 'RECURRING_DAY_OF_MONTH'] | | Set the time unit of invoicesDueIn. The special case RECURRING_DAY_OF_MONTH enables the due date to | | `isAutomaticNoticeOfDebtCollectionEnabled` | boolean | | Has automatic notice of debt collection enabled for this customer. | | `isAutomaticReminderEnabled` | boolean | | Has automatic reminders enabled for this customer. | | `isAutomaticSoftReminderEnabled` | boolean | | Has automatic soft reminders enabled for this customer. | | `isCustomer` | boolean | | (read-only) | | `isFactoring` | boolean | | If true; send this customers invoices to factoring (if factoring is turned on in account). | | `isInactive` | boolean | | | | `isPrivateIndividual` | boolean | | | | `isSupplier` | boolean | | Defines if the customer is also a supplier. | | `language` | string enum: ['NO', 'EN'] | | | | `ledgerAccount` | Account | | | | `name` | string | | | | `organizationNumber` | string | | | | `overdueNoticeEmail` | string | | The email address of the customer where the noticing emails are sent in case of an overdue | | `phoneNumber` | string | | | | `phoneNumberMobile` | string | | | | `physicalAddress` | Address | | | | `postalAddress` | Address | | | | `singleCustomerInvoice` | boolean | | Enables various orders on one customer invoice. | | `supplierNumber` | integer | | | | `url` | string | | (read-only) | | `version` | integer | | | | `website` | string | | | "}

content.text: Perfect! Now I'll create the supplier with the required information. I need to set `isSupplier: true` and provide the name, organization number, and email.
